title: KISS port 1 carries payload only, not full raw frame
description: python/src/lichen/interface/kiss/bridge.py:261,372 (RX) and 197-201 (TX). spec/kiss-framing.md §3.3: port 1 carries the full LICHEN Link Frame (Length, LLSec, Epoch, SeqNum, [Dest Addr], Payload, MIC, [Signature]); 'Raw LICHEN frames include all link-layer fields'. RX forwards only rx.frame.payload (signature already stripped by link_layer.receive, header never included); TX treats host bytes as bare payload and re-frames/re-signs instead of injecting the supplied frame. Tools written against §3.3 (sniffer/dissector/injector, use cases §5.2/§5.3) are incompatible in both directions. Pre-existing. Fix: pass raw frame bytes to port 1 on RX; transmit supplied frame verbatim on TX (or amend spec to redefine port 1 as payload-only).
